versions.changelog:
## What's New

- Replace kana-row classification with preset-based title browse (alphabet / japanese-kana)
- Add library-specific regex overrides for title prefix stripping
- Add HideEmptyVirtualFolders to hide empty virtual browse folders
- Fix Non-Quest playback URL query parameter (?dlnaheaders=true)
- Extend Browse settings UI with preset selection and config loading fixes

## Install

Add this plugin repository in Jellyfin Dashboard → Plugins → Repositories:

https://yuuta0331.github.io/jellyfin-plugin-dlna/manifest.json
